comment: Flow_ChaserDraft (ADR-0003). DRAFT-ONLY: composes a chaser body and writes a Chaser row with status=drafted. The boundary is enforced by the ABSENCE of any Outlook-send / WhatsApp-send action - a reviewer greps this flow for send operations and finds zero. WhatsApp send is not automatable (WhatsApp Business); email send is a separate flow behind the outbound kill switch. [BUILD]; activating any send path is [RESERVED-FOR-USER].

Compose_chaser_text.inputs: @concat('Hi ', coalesce(outputs('Get_case')?['body/cr1bd_evaclaimantname'], 'there'), ', regarding ', coalesce(outputs('Get_case')?['body/cr1bd_caseref'], ''), ' (', coalesce(outputs('Get_case')?['body/cr1bd_vrm'], ''), ') we still need: ', variables('outstandingText'), '. Could you reply with these so we can proceed?')

Create_chaser_draft.comment: channel whatsapp=100000001; status drafted=100000000. DRAFT ONLY - never auto-sends (ADR-0003). No send connector in this action list. The drafted Chaser row IS the authoritative record; the cr1bd_auditaction vocabulary has no chaser_drafted member (extend additively in the manifest before adding an AuditEvent write here - do NOT reuse an unrelated action value).
